meaning: n.餐桌上用有盖的焙盘,砂锅菜
examples: The lids of the casserole dishes are designed to double up as baking dishes.
We have green bean casserole and pumpkin pie.
Chefs say the students are happy just to have something for dinner beyond reheated tater tot casserole.
And those are just the first few layers of the gigantic competition casserole Intel is digging into right now.
